title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Wipro

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Wipro
jsonLd.description:
Wipro has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wipro:
Wipro is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro!
